1:
With the pumpkin-headed apparation's work nearly complete, she bids you return to the haunted manor and locate the Impresario within.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

With the pumpkin-headed apparition's work nearly complete, she bids you return to the Haunted Manor and locate the Impresario within. You can only imagine what sort of creation she has in mind to resolve the situation.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

2: Both you and the Impresario are shocked to discover the pumpkin-headed apparition's “gift”─a large, enchanted doll resembling the Impresario, complete with illusory magicks. With no time to lose, you are tasked with operating the mechanical Ambulario and calm the cacophony in the manor once and for all.

Both you and the Impresario are shocked to discover the pumpkin-headed apparition's “gift”─a large, enchanted doll resembling the Impresario, complete with illusory magicks. With no time to lose, you are tasked with operating the mechanical Ambulario and calming the cacophony in the manor once and for all.

3:
Armed with your new Ambulario and its dazzling illusions, you must seek out the Circus members and guests. Using your new powers of pacification, you may use the Ambulario's tricksome pumpkins to order the voidsent back to their ringleader, and its rain of treats to placate the manor's guests.

※Speak with the Impresario in the haunted mansion to mount the Ambulario.

Armed with your new Ambulario and its dazzling illusions, you must seek out the Circus members and guests. Using your new powers of pacification, you may use the Ambulario's tricksome pumpkins to order the voidsent back to their ringleader, and its rain of treats to placate the manor's guests.

※Speak with the Impresario in the Haunted Manor to mount the Ambulario.

7: Upon your meeting with the pumpkin-headed apparition, it is clear that the joys of All Saints' Wake have spread throughout Gridania, and children flock to the manor for treats. After years of devilish deeds, the Impresario is moved by the display, and vows to continue his efforts to provide his mortal guests with memorable performances. He humbly requests you keep the Ambulario, and use its likeness to the Impresario to spread word of his troupe across the realm.

Upon your meeting with the pumpkin-headed apparition, it is clear that the joys of All Saints' Wake have begun to spread throughout Gridania, and children flock to the manor for treats. After years of devilish deeds, the Impresario is moved by the display, and vows to continue his efforts to provide his mortal guests with memorable performances. He humbly entrusts you with the Ambulario, and use its likeness to the Impresario to spread word of his troupe across the realm.

24: Speak with the Impresario at the haunted manor.
Speak with the Impresario at the Haunted Manor.

26: Use [Pumpkin's Treat] on the second floor guest.
Use Trickster's Treat on the second floor guest.

27: Use [Pumpkin's Trick] on the second floor performers.
Use Treater's Trick on the second floor performer.

28: Use [Pumpkin's Treat] on the first floor guests.
Use Trickster's Treat on the first floor guest.

29: Use [Pumpkin's Trick] on the first floor performer.
Use Treater's Trick on the first floor performers.

31: Speak with the pumpkin-headed apparition in Gridania.
Speak with the Impresario in Gridania.

48: Has that mortal mind of your conjured up any reasonable solutions? We cannot afford to let the rest of the troupe have their way for much longer... I shall continue to welcome guests here and consider our options.

Has that mortal mind of yours contrived any reasonable solutions? We cannot afford to let the rest of the troupe have their way for much longer─I daresay our patrons will soon reach their limits. For now, I shall continue to watch over matters here and consider our options.

56: Heh heh... Now, let us put an end to the Continental Circus' cruel tricks, shall we?
Heh heh... Now, let us put an end to the Continental Circus's cruel tricks, shall we?

57: With the components you have gathered, I shall prepare the solution we require... But all good things take time. I suggest you return to the manor and report the good news to the Impresario. All shall be made clear there.

With the materials you have gathered, I shall prepare the solution we require... But all good things take time. I suggest you return to the manor and inform the Impresario of our plan. All shall be made clear soon enough.

66: I shall leave the operation of this magicked doll to you, adventurer. In this mortal glamour, I doubt I'd be able to maneuver the creature as well as you.
Might I leave the operation of this magicked doll to you, adventurer? In this mortal glamour, I doubt I'd be able to maneuver it as well as you.

67: Once you have shown them the error of their ways, order them to return to me, and I shall reinform them of the parts they must play here.
Once you have shown them the error of their ways, order them to return to me, and I shall reeducate them on the parts they must play here.

68: Our guests also deserve recompense for their prior treatment. Send them to me as well, that I might offer them sweets in apology. I cannot bear to end their All Saints' Wake on a dour note.

Our guests also deserve recompense for their prior treatment. I ask that you send them to me as well, that I might offer them sweets in apology. I cannot bear to end their All Saints' Wake on a dour note.

69: So your plans are made, yes? Then I shall return to my master. I wish you happy frightening and delightening!
So your plans are made, yes? Then I shall return to my master. I wish you happy frightening and delighting!

74: Speak with the Impresario to ride the Ambulario. You must use the correct actions to calm the voidsent and guests.
While riding the Ambulario, you must use the correct actions to calm the voidsent and guests. Should you become dismounted, you may speak with the Impresario to ride the Ambulario again.

77: You appear to have used the wrong spell. You must use the [Pumpkin's Treat] ability on this guest.
You appear to have used the wrong spell. You must use the Trickster's Treat ability on this guest.

83: You appear to have used the wrong spell. You must use the [Pumpkin's Trick] ability on the Continental Circus member.
You appear to have used the wrong spell. You must use the Treater's Trick ability on the Continental Circus member.

96: They're giving away free treats!? Hooray! Then I'll march right up to that Impresario and tell him to “gimmie candy!”
They're giving away free treats!? Hooray! Then I'll march right up to that Impresario and tell him to “gimme candy!”

98: Ohhh, sweet, sweet candy! Gimmie candy! Gimmie more!
Ohhh, sweet, sweet candy! Gimme candy! Gimme more!

104: Gimmie an elixir! And candy, too! Gimmie enough candy for everyone!
Gimme an elixir! And candy, too! Gimme enough candy for everyone!

115: All right, my fellow thespians! It's time we greeted our guests with good cheer. Return to your places, and give them all a masquerade they won't soon forget!
All right, my fellow thespians! It's time we greeted our guests with good cheer. Return to your places, and give them all the masquerade they deserve!

118: A woman sporting a white pumpkin head...? That sounds awfully like the legendary Great Gourd, who would command the voidsent forces in the Night of Devilry...
A woman sporting a white pumpkin head...? That sounds awfully like the legendary Great Gourd, who would command the voidsent forces on the Night of Devilry...

122: Heh heh... 'Tis an honor to finally meet the famed Impresario in the flesh.
Heh heh... 'Tis a pleasure to finally meet the famed Impresario.

123: I hear you've saved the Continental Circus' masquerade, adventurer! I'll gladly escort you to the haunted manor as many times as you'd like. Shall I guide you there now?
I hear you've saved the Continental Circus's masquerade, adventurer! I'll gladly escort you to the Haunted Manor as many times as you'd like. Shall I guide you there now?

126: Indeed it was. My brethren have remembered their duty to entertain, and our guests are all the merrier for it.
Indeed it was. My brethren have remembered their duty to entertain, and I daresay our guests shall be all the merrier for it.

127: Glad am I to hear it... I trust you will continue to give this city's mortal residents an exhilarating All Saints' Wake experience, my dear Impresario.
That is well... I trust you will continue to give this city's mortal residents an exhilarating All Saints' Wake experience.

136: But for the present, my duties call me to the manor, to continue our revels at the masquerade. Thus I ask you, adventurer: spread word of our deeds, and speak of us fondly in your travels.
But for the present, my duties call me to the manor. Thus do I ask of you, adventurer, to spread word of our deeds, and speak of us fondly in your travels.

138: A thoughtful plan indeed. Yours is the face of the Continental Circus, after all.
A sound plan. Yours is the face of the Continental Circus, after all.

142: One day, perhaps tales of my troupe will overshadow even those of the Great Gourd! But until that day comes, I shall continue my work─to convey to the realm all that the Wake can offer! Ahaha!
One day, perhaps tales of my troupe will overshadow even those of the Great Gourd! But until then, I shall continue my work─to convey to the realm all that the Wake can offer! Ahaha!

143: Now, then, duty calls me back to the manor. As you well know, I cannot leave those scoundrels without their ringleader for too long.
Now, then, 'tis time I returned. As you well know, I cannot leave those scoundrels without their ringleader for too long.

144: We shall be performing there for the remainder of the season. Should you wish to join in our festivities, you are welcome to visit us as often as you please.
We shall be performing at the manor for the remainder of the season. Should you wish to join in our festivities, you are welcome to visit us as often as you please.

149: また、守護天節のショップが開放されました！
Furthermore, the shady smock and her associates are now open for business.
